This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-24vr-rprv-67rf. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.29 contains a path traversal vulnerability in the install helper that allows workspace .env files to override the npm_execpath configuration used for bundled runtime dependency installation. Attackers with workspace access can execute unintended local package-manager executables during dependency setup to compromise the build environment.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qp5j-jr73-m2pw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:33:45Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp5j-jr73-m2pw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qp5j-jr73-m2pw"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:01Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:31:58Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-24vr-rprv-67rf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53846", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-arbitrary-package-manager-execution-via-workspace-env-npm-execpath", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp5j-jr73-m2pw"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Workspace .env npm_execpath could influence bundled runtime dependency install", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:33:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp5j-jr73-m2pw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.29"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:33:45Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: Workspace .env npm_execpath could influence bundled runtime dependency install
